return(function(v,k,x,f,A,t,z,n,X,C,i,L,P,S,d,Q,b,M,e,I,E)C,E,M,i,Q,b,e,d,L,X,S,I,P,n=function()L=L+(-874690-(-874691))S[L]=-711694-(-711695)return L end,function(v)for J=375794+-375793,#v,105319+-105318 do S[v[J]]=S[v[J]]+(-654723-(-654724))end if x then local M=x(true)local k=A(M)k[J(156549-107288)],k[J(130521-81111)],k[J(-614694-(-664173))]=v,Q,function()return-2323295-913702 end return M else return f({},{[J(-220140+269550)]=Q;[J(322907-273646)]=v,[J(-294225-(-343704))]=function()return 727653+-3964650 end})end end,function(M,x,f,A)local LN={}local end,function(v,J)local k=E(J)local x=function(x)return M(v,{x},J,k)end return x end,{},function(v,J)local k=E(J)local x=function(x,f,A)return M(v,{x,f,A},J,k)end return x end,-836069+836069,function(v,J)local k=E(J)local x=function(...)return M(v,{...},J,k)end return x end,{},function(v,J)local k=E(J)local x=function(x,f,A,t)return M(v,{x;f,A,t},J,k)end return x end,function(v)S[v]=S[v]-(490049+-490048)if-653496-(-653496)==S[v]then S[v],e[v]=nil,nil end end,function(v,J)local k=E(J)local x=function(x,f,A,t,z,e,S)return M(v,{x,f;A,t;z,e,S},J,k)end return x end return(X(2527562-(-5861),{}))(k(z))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[J(580472+-531093)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
